sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
content: By using the GoTour website, the User confirms their agreement with these Terms and Conditions.
If the User does not agree with any provision of these Terms, they must discontinue using the website.
Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of all applicable terms and rules.

sections.title: 2. Description of Services
content: GoTour provides information about travel destinations, tours, excursions, and related services.
Information published on the website is provided for informational purposes only and may be changed without prior notice.
Certain services may be provided by third-party partners and suppliers.

sections.title: 3. Bookings and Requests
content: Users may submit tour booking requests through forms available on the website.
Submitting a request does not guarantee confirmation of a booking.
A booking is considered confirmed only after the User receives an appropriate confirmation notice from the company.

sections.title: 4. Payment for Services
content: Prices for tours and services are displayed on the website or provided by a company representative.
Payments shall be made using the methods available at the time of placing an order.
The company reserves the right to modify service prices prior to booking confirmation.

sections.title: 5. User Obligations
content: The User agrees to provide accurate and up-to-date information when submitting forms on the website.
The User shall not use the website for any unlawful activities.
The User is responsible for safeguarding their personal information and account-related data.

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
content: All website content, including texts, images, logos, and design elements, constitutes intellectual property.
Copying, distributing, or otherwise using website materials without the prior written permission of the rights holder is prohibited.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
content: The company shall not be liable for any losses arising from the use of or inability to use the website.
The company does not guarantee uninterrupted operation of the website or the absence of technical errors.
The company shall not be responsible for the actions of third parties or external services.

sections.title: 8. Links to Third-Party Resources
content: The website may contain links to third-party websites.
The company does not control the content of such websites and is not responsible for the information published on them.

sections.title: 9. Amendments to the Terms
content: The company reserves the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time.
The current version of this document is published on the website and becomes effective upon publication.

sections.title: 10. Contact Information
content: For any questions regarding the use of the website, Users may contact us via email at [info@gotour.pro](mailto:info@gotour.pro).
The current version of the Terms and Conditions is available at: https://gotour.pro/terms-and-conditions.
